commit.message:
fix: align routes tests with app base path

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: PWA support

Framesnap can now be installed as a native-like app on desktop and mobile.

- Add @vite-pwa/nuxt with Workbox service worker (autoUpdate mode)
- Web app manifest: name, theme_color #0f172a, display standalone
- Icons generated with @vite-pwa/assets-generator from framesnap.svg:
  pwa-64x64.png, pwa-192x192.png, pwa-512x512.png,
  maskable-icon-512x512.png, apple-touch-icon-180x180.png, favicon.ico
- Caching strategy:
  - /_nuxt/* assets: CacheFirst (content-hashed, 1yr)
  - /api/thumbnails|frame: StaleWhileRevalidate
  - /api/upload|export|stream: NetworkOnly
- nginx: Cache-Control no-store for sw.js so updates are instant
- README: PWA install instructions table + HTTPS note

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: framesnap
repository.description: Browser-based app to extract high-quality PNG frames from videos. Upload a video, scrub through the timeline, set markers, and export them as a ZIP of PNGs. Run it locally or self-host it anywhere you like.

Add Mathematicians timeline page

- 22 mathematicians from Euclid (~325 BC) to Turing (1912)

- Detail panel with bio, quote, era/field tags, expandable contributions
- 'App connection' badge for mathematicians featured in Taylor/Fourier/Geometric modes
- Arrow key navigation through the timeline

* refactor: remove wasm-wit-doc crate, use wit-parser directly in wasm-frontend

Moves the WIT document model types and conversion logic from the
standalone `wasm-wit-doc` crate into an internal `wit_doc` module
within `wasm-frontend`. This eliminates the separate crate while
keeping the same document-model boundary.

- Removed `crates/wasm-wit-doc` crate and workspace references
- Added `wit_doc` module to `wasm-frontend` with types.rs and convert.rs
- Updated all frontend page imports to use `crate::wit_doc`
- Changed type visibility from `pub` to `pub(crate)` since they're now internal

commit.message:
test(use-cases): Phase 5 — use case unit tests with mock repositories

R-17: Add unit tests for all 4 domain use cases using Swift Testing (@Test).

DetectFacesUseCaseTests  (5 tests)
  - Verifies delegation and that coordinates are not transformed at the
    use-case boundary (Vision flip belongs in FaceDetectionService).

RenderMaskUseCaseTests   (4 tests)
  - Verifies all rendering parameters (faces, intensity, sizeMultiplier,
    solidCleanColor) are forwarded to the repository unchanged.

SaveToPhotosUseCaseTests (4 tests)
  - Verifies PhotoLibraryError.unauthorized propagation and generic error
    pass-through.

ProcessExportUseCaseTests (5 tests)
  - Verifies ExportSettings fields are forwarded unchanged.
  - Compile-time contract test confirms execute() is non-throwing by design.

All mocks are local private types; capturing mocks use final class for
safe mutation without mutating protocol requirements.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Sync TransactionSet.transactions with generalized_tx_set after trimming

Reconstruct the flat transactions vector from the trimmed phase
contents instead of using the pre-trim selection. Previously, trim-
invalid transactions could remain in the flat vector while absent
from the generalized tx set, causing compare_tx_sets() to use
inflated op-count and fee metrics for local candidates.

Fixes #1184

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: fan-out parallel runspace connection, fix Get-AzAIAgent manifest parsing

- Invoke-AzAIFanOut: use Start-ThreadJob with module reload + connection
  injection instead of ForEach-Object -Parallel (runspace isolation fix)
- Get-AzAIAgent: parse nested identity.* and runtime.* fields from
  Workbench manifest response

E2E verified against live AI Workbench:
- Module import (7 cmdlets)
- Connect-AzAIFoundry (Workbench mode)
- Get-AzAIAgent (13 agents, correct Name/Mode/Tools)
- Invoke-AzAIAgent agent_reference (MSLearn, 10s, tool calls, tokens)
- Invoke-AzAIAgent direct mode (gpt-5-mini, 5s)
- Shared conversation + agent switching (context preserved)
- Invoke-AzAIFanOut (2 parallel branches, both succeed)
- Invoke-AzAISynthesize (branch results → shared conversation)
- Full pipeline: triage → fan-out → synthesize (all on same conv)
- Pipeline input: agent names piped to Invoke-AzAIFanOut

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: implement mapper 156 (Daou Infosys DIS23C01) (#1950)

* feat: implement mapper 156 (Daou Infosys DIS23C01)

Adds Mapper156 for iNES mapper 156.

- 8 × 1 KB CHR banking with 9-bit bank numbers
  - Low 8 bits: $C000-$C003 (slots 0-3), $C008-$C00B (slots 4-7)
  - High bit: $C004-$C007 (slots 0-3), $C00C-$C00F (slots 4-7)
- PRG: 16 KB switchable at $8000 via $C010 (bits 3:0); fixed last bank at $C000
- PRG-RAM: 8 KB at $6000-$7FFF
- Mirroring: $C014 bits 1:0 (00=V, 01=H, 1x=one-screen page 0); defaults to one-screen
- 20 unit tests; all passing
- Added 154, 156, 173 to SUPPORTED_MAPPERS (were missing)

Fixes #1067

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: mapper 156 always allocates 8 KB PRG-RAM

Mapper 156 always has 8 KB WRAM at $6000–$7FFF.
Force ctx.prg_ram_banks_8k = 1 and ctx.prg_ram_size_specified = true
before BaseMapper::new() so PRG-RAM is allocated even when the iNES
header omits the WRAM size field.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: 棱镜（Prism）v0.1 — 多视角协同分析引擎

新增 prism/ 子系统，将多 Agent 协同分析能力正式化为可复用的标准流程：

架构
- 双协议族：独立取样型（explore/redteam/test）和议事型（council）
- 6 步独立取样协议：Frame → Dispatch(Firewall) → Collect(quorum) → Synthesize → Adjudicate → Archive
- 议事协议：N 轮收敛，共享前轮摘要，70% 阈值终止

关键设计决策（基于两轮 rubber-duck 评审）
- Dispatch Firewall：执行阶段 Agent 不得读取 reports/ 或他人中间产出
- 超时治理：30min 超时，1次重试，60% quorum
- Adjudicate 裁决：consensus/weak/deadlock/escalate 四档，deadlock 强制暂停等人类决策
- 记忆接入：采纳的结论沉淀至 knowledge/lessons.md（复活协议必读文件）
- 报告永久 git 追踪，index.yaml 结构化索引
- 触发条件改为风险信号驱动（不再用文件数量）
- §10 PM Gate 权威：Prism 无权推翻已锁定需求，冲突时 escalate

文件
- prism/README.md：概览和快速参考
- prism/protocol.md：完整协议（双协议族 + 触发条件 + 迁移矩阵 + index schema）
- prism/modes/：explore/redteam/test 各模式说明
- prism/roles/README.md：角色分配指南
- prism/reports/index.yaml：报告索引（初始为空）
- CONTRIBUTING.md §11：棱镜集成指南（§8/§9 保留，Prism 为系统化路径）

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Revert Newtonsoft.Json dependency tracking (#15596) (#15651)

Reverts the assembly resolution tracking and warning mechanism for
Newtonsoft.Json that was added in #15596. Investigation showed that:

- vstest's AssemblyResolver.OnResolve never fires for Newtonsoft.Json
  because it is loaded via normal CLR probing before the event triggers
- On .NET Framework, MSTest has its own AssemblyResolver in a separate
  AppDomain that resolves NJ independently from vstest's resolver
- The ProvidedDependencies telemetry was always empty in practice
- No feasible proactive warning mechanism exists for this scenario

The [DoNotParallelize] test fixes from the same PR are preserved.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: add Direct VPC Egress so UI can reach internal-only API

Without VPC egress, Cloud Run-to-Cloud Run requests in the same project
are routed through the public internet and rejected as external traffic
by INGRESS_TRAFFIC_INTERNAL_ONLY (404).

Adding Direct VPC Egress with egress=ALL_TRAFFIC routes the UI container's
outbound requests through the project's default VPC.  Cloud Run then
recognises those requests as intra-VPC (internal) traffic, satisfying the
API's ingress restriction without a Serverless VPC Access Connector.

ALL_TRAFFIC (not PRIVATE_RANGES_ONLY) is required because the API's
*.run.app hostname resolves to a public IP; only ALL_TRAFFIC sends that
through the VPC path so Cloud Run treats it as internal.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Remove cbodnar.com CNAME — serve from randubin.github.io/ByteDefend

commit.message:
fix: Demo DB schema + uptime monitor

Root cause: init.sql never ran on Neon — tables were missing.
Manually initialized Neon DB (all 63 tables now exist).

Fixes:
- docker/init.sql: Move hospital_patient_invites after hospital_networks
  (was forward reference — dependency didn't exist yet when run stmt-by-stmt)
- docker/init.sql: Quote 'current_role' column in role_change_requests
  (PostgreSQL reserved keyword — caused syntax error preventing table creation)
- backend/src/routes/index.ts: Quote current_role in all SQL queries
- backend/src/utils/database.ts: Quote current_role in CREATE TABLE safety net
- render-start.sh: SEED_ON_STARTUP only seeds if DB empty (not force-reseed).
  FORCE_RESEED=true is the only way to force a re-seed.
- .github/workflows/uptime-monitor.yml: New workflow — pings both Demo and Dev
  every 5 minutes to prevent Render/Neon free-tier spin-down

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Replace legacy auth endpoints table with actual /auth/me and /auth/config routes
- Fix cache endpoint docs: /cache/health is public, /cache/metrics response shape corrected
- Fix video structure endpoint path: GET /media/{media_id}/structure
- Fix A2A task store docs: PostgreSQL-primary with in-memory fallback

- Fix workflow trigger docs: deploy-ai-foundry and deploy-hosted-agent have push triggers

fix: ensure vuln files are cached and re-extracted when missing

Two fixes to ensure per-arch vulnerability JSON files are always
available for the dashboard links:

   container images - force re-extraction when:

   - any per-arch vuln file is missing from disk (cache cleared)

   paths alongside sboms/, so per-arch vuln attestation files persist
   between workflow runs and are deployed to GitHub Pages

recommendation to prevent accidentally committing DB credentials.

  SearchPage, SetupPage

commit.message:
Deploy: 更新博客内容 2026-04-10 21:28:57

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(vip): increase default inter_conv_gap to 400ns for 2-context MPTDC

The MPTDC has N_CTX=2 contexts. With the old 50ns gap, a 3rd conversion
arrives while both contexts are still measuring, causing the async frontend
to reject it (any_ctx_free=0). 400ns ensures at least one context frees
before the next conversion starts.

Also adds optional gap_ps parameter to gen_tdc_conversions for tests
that need explicit control.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Initial commit: Investor Sophistication Survey

- Single-page HTML survey with 9 scored questions
- Google Sheets integration for response collection
- Optional name/email/phone fields
- localStorage duplicate prevention with edit capability
- Results page with score breakdown and persona matrix

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Remove duplicate startup flow-control grant in peer loop

The initial SEND_MORE_EXTENDED grant was sent twice: once in
Peer::handshake() after authentication (correct, matches stellar-core
recvAuth), and again at the start of run_peer_loop(). Remove the
duplicate to prevent granting 400/400000 credits instead of 200/300000.

Fixes #1172

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix download modal to immediately trigger PDF download with improved UX

- Changed download trigger from 1.5s delay (window.open) to immediate
- Implemented reliable download method using anchor element with download attribute
- Updated success message from 'Subscribed!' to 'Perfect! Your download is starting'
- Added secondary message confirming newsletter subscription
- Reduced success display time from 1.5s to 1s for faster modal closure
- Improved code with comments explaining browser compatibility approach

This ensures users see the correct download confirmation and PDFs start downloading immediately after form submission, rather than being redirected or experiencing delayed downloads.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(seo): fix duplicate HTML in E-E-A-T pages and add internal links for discovery

- Fix race condition: locale variant loop wrote to same file as primary page
  for /about/, /contact/, /privacy-policy/ (skip if locPath === url.path)
- Add English E-E-A-T alias links (/about/, /contact/, /privacy-policy/)
  to SPA footer so squirrelscan discovers them via JS rendering
- Add same links to all locale NAV_LABELS in static page generator
  so every static HTML page links to E-E-A-T pages

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
